parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Prowl destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise prowl:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
parameters.gateway_body_template: apikey=${ customer_secrets.PROWL_APIKEY }&application={* _escape_json(_body.title or "UnitySVC") *}&description={* _escape_json(_body.body or _body.title or "") *}&event={* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}&priority=0
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Prowl API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Prowl destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Prowl apikey
